title: Anime Emotional Fragment Poster AI
sourceTitle: Anime Emotional Fragment Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Vertical anime emotional-fragment poster for Astra Vale from Moonfall Archive, capturing Character: character name Anime / series: anime or series name Emotional title: dark mysterious cinematic mood Short quote on poster: dark mysterious cinematic mood Main as one intense frozen dramatic moment. Subject: Astra Vale appears with visible emotional tension through eyes, mouth, shoulders, hands, body angle, hair, clothes, and weapon or prop language rather than a calm character-card pose. Scene: Clean dark negative-space background with cracked moon shards, blue fire, falling ash, broken glass panels cutting through the image as symbolic fragments around the character. Composition: 9:16 cinematic poster with sharp irregular fragments, broken panels, close-up detail windows for eyes, hands, weapon, and outfit textures, controlled visual effects, and one dominant emotional center. Signature Elements: Preserved anime emotional fragment poster source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Fixed source details: Main Colors: deep navy and black with electric cyan accent. Style: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Color Palette: Character: character name Anime / series: anime or series name Emotional title: dark mysterious cinematic mood Short quote on poster: dark mysterious cinematic mood Main colors: dark mysterious cinematic mood Symbolic controls the dark base and single accent system, keeping the poster dramatic, sharp, and uncluttered. Typography: Large character name Astra Vale, subtitle Character: character name Anime / series: anime or series name Emotional title: dark mysterious cinematic mood Short quote on poster: dark mysterious cinematic mood Main, series name Moonfall Archive, and short quote I kept the light even when it broke me. appear as broken but readable cinematic poster text. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

Theme: Vertical anime emotional-fragment poster for Astra Vale from Moonfall Archive, capturing Character: character name Anime / series: anime or series name Emotional title: dark mysterious cinematic mood Short quote on poster: dark mysterious cinematic mood Main as one intense frozen dramatic moment. Subject: Astra Vale appears with visible emotional tension through eyes, mouth, shoulders, hands, body angle, hair, clothes, and weapon or prop language rather than a calm character-card pose. Scene: Clean dark negative-space background with cracked moon shards, blue fire, falling ash, broken glass panels cutting through the image as symbolic fragments around the character. Composition: 9:16 cinematic poster with sharp irregular fragments, broken panels, close-up detail windows for eyes, hands, weapon, and outfit textures, controlled visual effects, and one dominant emotional center. Signature Elements: Preserved anime emotional fragment poster source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Fixed source details: Main Colors: deep navy and black with electric cyan accent. Style: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Color Palette: Character: character name Anime / series: anime or series name Emotional title: dark mysterious cinematic mood Short quote on poster: dark mysterious cinematic mood Main colors: dark mysterious cinematic mood Symbolic controls the dark base and single accent system, keeping the poster dramatic, sharp, and uncluttered. Typography: Large character name Astra Vale, subtitle Character: character name Anime / series: anime or series name Emotional title: dark mysterious cinematic mood Short quote on poster: dark mysterious cinematic mood Main, series name Moonfall Archive, and short quote I kept the light even when it broke me. appear as broken but readable cinematic poster text. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.
